title: Trin Gramados Extension Pack - custom car & trucks skins
description: This Immersive Vehicle package adds many new skins and liveries to vehicles from other packs !
body:
# Trin Gramados Expansion Pack - Custom Skins for the Gramados Server!

_Immersive Vehicles is a Minecraft mod that lets you download vehicle packs, including planes, cars, and more._

This expansion pack doesn't introduce new vehicles but enhances existing ones from packs like Trin and UNU with custom skins tailored for the Gramados and Trin lore. These new skins integrate seamlessly into the Gramados server experience, offering:

- Gramados server RP company skins
- Gramados Police skins for UNU police cars
- Fun and exotic skins with no purpose

With Trin's expansion into various vehicular markets, these packs are now available:

- [Trin Civil Pack V2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-vehicles-trin-civil-pack-v2)
- [Trin Civil Pack V4](https://modrinth.com/mod/trin-civil-pack)
- [Trin Decor Pack](https://modrinth.com/mod/trin-decor-pack)

For a personalized touch, explore the [Trin Online Configurator](http://trin.legends-of-gramdatis.com/ "Trin Online Configurator") to design your ideal Trin vehicle.

_Feedback and bug reports are always appreciated! Feel free to use Trin Packs on servers or include them in your mod packs._

**Get more information on planned vehicles, games, ordering custom liveries, and more by joining the Trin official [Discord](https://discord.gg/6rDJ3MR)**
